<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelRay\Payloads; use Illuminate\Database\Query\Builder; use Spatie\Ray\Payloads\Payload; class QueryPayload extends Payload { /** @var \Illuminate\Database\Query\Builder */ protected $query; public function __construct(Builder $query) { $this->query = $query; } public function getType(): string { return 'executed_query'; } public function getContent(): array { if (method_exists($this->query, 'toRawSql')) { return [ 'sql' => $this->query->toRawSql(), ]; } return [ 'sql' => $this->query->toSql(), 'bindings' => $this->query->getBindings(), ]; } }
